svg.text: Elicitation-ladder trajectory: AI − Human mean difference across rungs (n=25 matched entity pairs per rung)
Each panel: one metric. X-axis = rung. Y-axis = mean(AI rung − Human) ± SD across 25 entities. Reference line at y=0 (parity with human).
Line trending toward 0 across rungs = elicitation moves AI toward human on that metric.
Each rung = mean of 3 seeds per entity. Source: analysis-outputs/structural-v2-per-doc.csv + per-doc-metrics.csv + inferential-per-doc.csv.
